manufacturer.note: Cadbury has been owned by Mondelez International since the 2010 Kraft takeover.

ingredientsText.value: Milk, Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Vegetable Fats (Palm, Shea), Emulsifiers (E442, E476), Flavourings
ingredientsText.note: Current GB label from the manufacturer's own product page. An earlier Open Food Facts transcription carried a longer, soya-lecithin-bearing list (with dried whey and milk fat); that appears to be a non-GB or stale formulation and was set aside in favour of the manufacturer page. GB Dairy Milk uses emulsifiers E442 and E476 rather than soya lecithin. Vegetable fats (palm, shea) are permitted up to 5% under GB chocolate rules.

sugars.note: About 56 to 57g per 100g, stable across 2019 to 2026. The FSA-linked sugar reduction produced a separate lower-sugar variant (see the timeline event), not a reduction of the standard bar.

provenance.value: Declared on the current GB label
Carries a may-contain-nuts precautionary statement on the current GB label
Carries a may-contain-wheat precautionary statement on the current GB label
